linkedin_data.about:
I'm a marketing and creative strategist working at the intersection of IP, entertainment, and emerging technology—planning campaigns and partnerships that connect strong IP with audiences in meaningful, contemporary ways.
My career in advertising began in 2007, with media planning roles at Hakuhodo Products, Hakuhodo, and Dentsu Inc., where I worked across automotive, global branding, TV programs, and more. In 2016, I went independent, and in 2018, I incorporated my own company. This year marks ten years of running it—delivering marketing and creative strategies for clients across entertainment, automotive, and advertising.
These days, I'm especially drawn to how AI, IP, and the metaverse are reshaping storytelling and audience engagement—and to the work happening at the intersection of these worlds.
Currently open to new projects and collaborations, both through my company and as an individual. Feel free to reach out anytime.

- Education: Ritsumeikan Asia Pacific University — Bachelor of Media Communication

- Skills & Tools: Communication Planning / Project Direction / IP & Entertainment Marketing / Event Production / Content Development Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere) / Microsoft Office / Keynote PADI Advanced Open Water Diver / CPR Trainer… moreTop skillsProject Management • Team Leadership • Team Management • Event Planning
